title: Infrastructure & Data
description: Hardware metrics, audit log, raw DB tables, system settings — the deep ops view

targets.rawSql: SELECT pg_database_size(current_database()) as db_size_bytes
SELECT COUNT(*) as active_connections FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = current_database()
SELECT COALESCE(state, 'unknown') as state, COUNT(*) as count FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = current_database() GROUP BY state
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - backend_start))), 0) as max_conn_age_seconds FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = current_database()
SELECT schemaname, relname as table_name, n_live_tup as estimated_rows, n_dead_tup as dead_rows, last_vacuum, last_autovacuum, last_analyze FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY n_live_tup DESC
SELECT relname as table_name, pg_total_relation_size(quote_ident(relname)) as total_size_bytes FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY total_size_bytes DESC

SELECT relname as table_name, idx_scan as index_scans, seq_scan as sequential_scans, (idx_scan + seq_scan) as total_scans, CASE WHEN (idx_scan + seq_scan) > 0 THEN ROUND(idx_scan * 100.0 / (idx_scan + seq_scan), 1) ELSE 0 END as idx_scan_pct FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE (idx_scan + seq_scan) > 0 ORDER BY total_scans DESC

SELECT pid, usename, state, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - query_start)) as duration_seconds, LEFT(query, 200) as query FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = current_database() AND state != 'idle' AND pid != pg_backend_pid() ORDER BY query_start ASC
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(blks_hit) / NULLIF(SUM(blks_hit) + SUM(blks_read), 0), 2) as cache_hit_ratio FROM pg_stat_database WHERE datname = current_database()
SELECT xact_commit as committed, xact_rollback as rolled_back FROM pg_stat_database WHERE datname = current_database()
SELECT relname as table_name, n_dead_tup as dead_tuples FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE n_dead_tup > 0 ORDER BY n_dead_tup DESC

options.content: **Real-time metrics from nvidia-smi exporter + Poindexter worker.**

targets.rawSql: SELECT utilization FROM gpu_metrics ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT temperature FROM gpu_metrics ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_draw FROM gpu_metrics ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(((memory_used/NULLIF(memory_total,0))*100)::numeric,1) FROM gpu_metrics ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT to_char("timestamp",'HH24:MI') as sample_time, utilization as util, temperature as temp, ROUND(power_draw::numeric) as watts, memory_used as vram, fan_speed as fan, clock_graphics as clock FROM gpu_metrics WHERE "timestamp">NOW()-INTERVAL '2 hours' ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT date_trunc('day',"timestamp")::date as day, ROUND(AVG(utilization)::numeric,1) as util, ROUND(AVG(temperature)::numeric,1) as temp, ROUND(AVG(power_draw)::numeric) as watts, COUNT(*) as samples FROM gpu_metrics GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 7

panels.title: Gaming Detected
panels.description: Pipeline pauses automatically when external GPU workload (gaming) is detected

panels.title: Gaming Detection & Pipeline Status
panels.description: Shows when gaming pauses the pipeline vs active GPU usage

panels.title: Total Gaming Pause
panels.description: Cumulative time pipeline has been paused for gaming since worker start

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE severity='error'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT source) FROM audit_log
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) FROM audit_log WHERE task_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT severity as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM audit_log GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT source as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM audit_log GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT event_type as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM audit_log GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT id, to_char("timestamp",'MM-DD HH24:MI') as event_time, event_type, source, task_id, severity, LEFT(details::text,100) as details FROM audit_log ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT to_char("timestamp",'MM-DD HH24:MI') as event_time, event_type, source, LEFT(details::text,120) as details FROM audit_log WHERE severity='error' ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT LEFT(topic, 50) as topic, status, quality_score, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM pipeline_tasks_view ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT LEFT(title, 50) as title, slug, published_at::date FROM posts WHERE status='published' ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT model, provider, ROUND(cost_usd::numeric, 6) as cost, total_tokens, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM cost_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT entity, attribute, LEFT(value::text, 60) as value, confidence, updated_at::timestamp(0) FROM brain_knowledge ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT LEFT(decision, 30) as type, LEFT(reasoning, 80) as reasoning, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM brain_decisions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT timestamp::timestamp(0), event_type, source, severity, LEFT(details::text, 80) as details FROM audit_log ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT key, LEFT(value, 40) as value, category FROM app_settings WHERE is_secret = false ORDER BY category, key
SELECT path, referrer, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM page_views ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT LEFT(content_id, 12) as content_id, ROUND(overall_score::numeric, 1) as score, ROUND(clarity::numeric, 1) as clarity, ROUND(accuracy::numeric, 1) as accuracy, ROUND(completeness::numeric, 1) as completeness, evaluation_timestamp::timestamp(0) FROM quality_evaluations ORDER BY evaluation_timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT c.name, c.slug, COUNT(p.id) as post_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.category_id = c.id AND p.status = 'published' GROUP BY c.name, c.slug ORDER BY post_count DESC
SELECT username, email, role, is_active, last_login_at::timestamp(0), created_at::date FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT LEFT(task_id, 12) as task_id, old_status, new_status, changed_by, LEFT(reason, 60) as reason, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM task_status_history ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT email, status, source, created_at::timestamp(0) FROM newsletter_subscribers ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Quick overview of all table sizes

targets.rawSql: SELECT relname AS table_name, n_live_tup AS row_count FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE schemaname = 'public' ORDER BY n_live_tup DESC

panels.title: Table Row Counts

targets.rawSql: SELECT pg_size_pretty(pg_database_size(current_database())) AS db_size

SELECT LEFT(task_id, 12) as task_id, LEFT(topic, 60) as topic, quality_score, style, tone, created_at::timestamp(0), updated_at::timestamp(0) FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'awaiting_approval' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_settings
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prompt_templates WHERE is_active=true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_stages WHERE enabled=true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_agents WHERE is_active=true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_permissions
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert_actions WHERE enabled=true
SELECT key, value, category FROM app_settings WHERE is_secret=false ORDER BY category, key
SELECT key, category, LENGTH(template) as chars, version FROM prompt_templates ORDER BY category, key

SELECT agent_name, resource, action, CASE WHEN allowed AND NOT requires_approval THEN 'ALLOW' WHEN requires_approval THEN 'APPROVAL' ELSE 'DENY' END as access FROM agent_permissions ORDER BY agent_name, resource
SELECT name, agent_type, trust_level, is_active FROM system_agents ORDER BY trust_level DESC
